description: Follow-up to bl-77a7 (spec burn of §16). Delete the doctor implementation now that the spec retired it. Targets: src/doctor.rs, src/doctor_tests.rs, src/delivery_doctor.rs, src/delivery_doctor_tests.rs, and unwire doctor from src/lib.rs, src/verb.rs, src/registry.rs, src/lifecycle.rs, src/delivery.rs, src/bin/bl-delivery.rs, tests/delivery.rs. Also scrub the SKILL.md command-table row and README/SPEC-clone-layout/SPEC-tracker-state/CHANGELOG mentions. Replace doctor's three load-bearing silent checks with point-of-use errors that name the fix verb: (a) missing bin/<name> for a wired plugin -> the op that needs it errors 'plugin X referenced but bin/X missing — run bl install'; (b) protocol drift -> already rejected at dispatch (§6), confirm message names the fix; (c) blocker cycle -> readiness/blocker walk errors on cycle naming bl update to unlink. Keep 100% coverage + 300-line cap; deleting modules will surface orphan-coverage (see memory) — add narrow tests or simplify now-dead branches.
title: Remove bl doctor code (src/doctor.rs, delivery_doctor, wiring)
